mapper.select: SELECT sub.classSeq, sub.memberSeq, sub.status FROM ( SELECT a.class_seq AS classSeq, a.member_seq AS memberSeq, CASE a.status WHEN '출석' THEN 'O' WHEN '연기' THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END AS status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY a.class_seq, a.member_seq ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC ) AS rn FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.time_slot_seq = #{slotSeq} ) sub WHERE sub.rn <= 14 ORDER BY sub.classSeq, sub.memberSeq, sub.rn

SELECT a.seq AS seq, a.attendance_date AS attendanceDate, a.status AS status, c.name AS className, a.note AS note FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{memberSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, c.name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.seq AS seq, a.attendance_date AS attendanceDate, a.status AS status, c.name AS className, a.note AS note FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{staffSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, c.name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '결석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '연기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS postponeCount, MIN(a.attendance_date) AS startDate, MAX(a.attendance_date) AS endDate FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{memberSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '결석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '연기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS postponeCount, MIN(a.attendance_date) AS startDate, MAX(a.attendance_date) AS endDate FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{staffSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq}

SELECT a.member_seq AS staffSeq, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = a.member_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND a.attendance_date >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY a.member_seq
